User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://ziontechgroup.com/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /temp/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /services/
Allow: /solutions/
Allow: /about/
Allow: /contact/
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /careers/

# Allow important pages
Allow: /about
Allow: /services
Allow: /contact
Allow: /blog
Allow: /careers
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms

# Crawl delay (optional)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specific rules for major search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1
=======
# Specific bot rules
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0.5

Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp

Crawl-delay: 2

# Block AI training bots
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

User-agent: Omgilibot
Disallow: /
=======
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

# Rate limiting for aggressive crawlers
User-agent: *
Crawl-delay: 2
